headline: A Look At General Electric (GE) Valuation As New Energy Orders And Aerospace Investments Build Momentum
summary: General Electric (GE) is back in focus after GE Vernova reported a 54% year-over-year jump in gas turbine orders, along with new energy partnerships and capacity investments that are drawing fresh attention to the stock. See our latest analysis for General Electric. Recent announcements around GE Vernova’s turbine orders, GE Aerospace’s expanded AI partnership with Palantir, and capacity investments in Europe come as the share price has a 1 month share price return decline of 12.5% and a 1...
